display.purpose: Page titles, manga hero titles, and special states.

headline.purpose: Section leads and admin page headings.

title.purpose: Card names, panel headers, and form section titles.

body.purpose: Descriptions, comments, policy copy, and settings text.

label.purpose: Chips, table headers, metadata labels, and compact controls.

shadows.name: card-hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Optional hover response for cards that need tactile feedback.

shadows.name: gold-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary call-to-action hover or rare emphasis.

shadows.name: auth-panel-depth
shadows.purpose: Centered auth surfaces and major account flows.

shadows.name: thumbnail-lift
shadows.purpose: Small cover images in admin tables and lists.

motion.name: quick-admin-state
motion.purpose: Admin table, tab, and compact control state changes.

components.name: Primary Gold Button
components.description: Use for submit, save, selected tab, and high-confidence actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #fbbf24; color: #0a0a0a; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #f59e0b; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.28); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fafafa; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Manga Card
components.description: The signature public cover card with immersive image, gradient overlay, category chip, and compact metadata.
components.html:
Furry

Translated Fandom Title

★ 4.8 · 12.4K Views
components.css: .ds-manga-card { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 2 / 3; width: 180px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 8px; background: #0a0a0a; color: #fafafa; font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-manga-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-manga-card:focus-within { outline: 2px solid #fbbf24; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-manga-cover { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #262626, #0a0a0a); } .ds-manga-cover::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.9) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.4) 50%, transparent 100%); } .ds-manga-chip { position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; background: #fbbf24; color: #0a0a0a; border-radius: 8px; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-manga-overlay { position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; padding: 12px; } .ds-manga-overlay h3 { margin: 0 0 4px; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.1; font-weight: 600; text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.8); } .ds-manga-overlay p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.82rem; color: #fafafa; opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Filter Panel
components.description: Compact discovery control for search, sorting, categories, and tags.
components.css: .ds-filter-panel { background: #171717; color: #fafafa; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; width: 280px; font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; } .ds-filter-head { width: 100%; background: transparent; color: #fafafa; border: 0; padding: 4px 0 12px; text-align: left; font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; } .ds-filter-head:hover { color: #fbbf24; } .ds-filter-head:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fbbf24; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-filter-panel label { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: #a3a3a3; font-size: 0.85rem; } .ds-filter-panel input { background: transparent; color: #fafafa; border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); padding: 6px 0; font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.85rem; } .ds-filter-panel input:focus-visible { outline: 0; border-bottom-color: #fbbf24; }

components.name: Admin Surface
components.description: Industrial work panel for dashboard, tables, and moderation flows.
components.css: .ds-admin-surface { background: #171717; color: #fafafa; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; box-shadow: none; } .ds-admin-surface:hover { background: #1b1b1b; border-color: rgba(251,191,36,0.28); } .ds-admin-surface:focus-within { outline: 2px solid #FABF06; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-admin-surface header { display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; } .ds-admin-surface span { color: #a3a3a3; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.08em; } .ds-admin-surface strong { color: #FABF06; font-size: 2rem; line-height: 1; } .ds-admin-surface p { margin: 10px 0 0; color: #a3a3a3; font-size: 0.9rem; }

components.name: Category Chip
components.description: Gold content classification marker used over covers and metadata surfaces.
components.css: .ds-category-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 20px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 8px; background: #fbbf24; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; } .ds-category-chip:hover { background: #f59e0b; } .ds-category-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fafafa; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Dark Text Field
components.description: Standard dark input for settings, auth, search, and admin forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: #a3a3a3; font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-field input { background: #262626; color: #fafafa; border: 1px solid #404040; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.95rem; } .ds-field input:hover { border-color: #fbbf24; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(251,191,36,0.45); outline-offset: 2px; border-color: #fbbf24; } .ds-field input:disabled { color: #737373; background: #171717; cursor: not-allowed; }

narrative.overview:
MAGGA is a dark, focused archive for Thai-translated furry manga and doujin works. The public surface should feel immersive and reader-first: covers, manga pages, authors, categories, tags, and comments do the visual work. Interface chrome stays quiet so the archive feels curated, not noisy.

The admin surface is allowed to feel more industrial: compact, dark, gold-led, table-friendly, and built for repeated moderation work. Public screens should never inherit a generic dashboard mood. Admin screens can be dense, but they still need the same credibility and restraint as the reader experience.

This system rejects the exact anti-references in PRODUCT.md: manga sites overloaded with ads, generic SaaS dashboards, and low-quality 18+ sites that feel suspicious or disposable. Mature content should be presented with control, clarity, and enough polish to feel trustworthy.
keyCharacteristics: Dark neutral canvas with gold used as a directional signal.
Manga covers and reader pages are the main visual asset.
Public UI is immersive; admin UI is industrial and compact.
Forms, filters, and tables stay focused and credible.
Motion is present only as feedback, not spectacle.

rules.name: The Gold Is Navigation Rule
rules.body: Gold marks a path, a selected state, or a meaningful action. Do not use it as ambient decoration across a whole screen.

rules.name: The Dark Archive Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds stay neutral and deep. Avoid saturated full-screen color fields that compete with manga covers.

rules.name: The Mature Trust Rule
rules.body: Red and neon-like colors are functional only. If a screen starts to resemble a low-trust 18+ site, remove saturation before adding more UI.

rules.name: The Thai Readability Rule
rules.body: Never compress Thai body text to look sleek. If a label or paragraph becomes cramped, give it more space before reducing legibility.

rules.name: The Weight Before Decoration Rule
rules.body: Use weight, size, and placement for hierarchy. Do not introduce decorative fonts or gradient text.

rules.name: The Industrial Admin Rule
rules.body: Admin panels are flat at rest, bordered, and compact. Shadows are secondary to structure.

rules.name: The Immersive Public Rule
rules.body: Public cards and reader surfaces should let images create depth. UI shadows must not overpower cover art.

dos: Do keep manga covers, reader pages, authors, tags, and categories visually central.
Do use archive gold for directional actions and selected states.
Do keep public pages immersive and admin pages industrial.
Do preserve WCAG A minimum behavior: readable contrast, visible focus, keyboard-operable controls, and non-hover alternatives.
Do keep mobile reading and image-heavy performance in mind before adding motion, shadows, or extra client-side UI.
Do use thin borders, tonal surfaces, and compact spacing for admin workflows.
donts: Don't make MAGGA look like a manga site overloaded with ads, popups, confusing banners, or visual clutter.
Don't make public reader and discovery surfaces look like a generic SaaS dashboard.
Don't borrow the untrustworthy visual language common to low-quality 18+ sites: aggressive colors, fake urgency, unreadable layouts, suspicious controls, or throwaway content presentation.
Don't use gradient text. Use solid color, weight, and scale.
Don't use thick colored side-stripe borders on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts.
Don't cover manga art with decorative chrome that does not help reading, discovery, submission, or moderation.
